title: 9673999980 Fan Relay Radiator Resistor Aluminum ABS Replacement fit for C4 Picasso Berlingo
features: The 9673999980 Fan Relay is designed to replace worn-out Car Engine Blower Motor Fan Resistors, ensuring optimal performance for your vehicle’s cooling system.
Made from a robust combination of aluminum and ABS, this Fan Relay is built to withstand high temperatures and environmental stress, providing long-lasting use.
Specifically engineered as a replacement part for C4 Berlingo models, ensuring seamless integration and hassle-free installation.
This Fan Relay improves the functionality of your car's engine blower, helping maintain optimal temperature levels and preventing overheating.
